---
title: "US/UK Exchange Rate Volatility"
description: "An econometrics project evaluating and forecasting US/UK exchange rates using symmetric vs. asymmetric GARCH frameworks."
image: "ex.jpg"
---

### Project Deliverables

::: {layout-ncol=2}

::: {.card .text-center .p-3}
[![](code_icon.png)](stats_170_final-2.R)

[**Code Script**](stats_170_final-2.R)
:::

::: {.card .text-center .p-3}
[![](slide_icon.png)](170_Final_Report-2.pdf)

[**Final Report (PDF)**](170_Final_Report-2.pdf)
:::

:::
